summary: v2.8 (Franchise Model Templates + Auto Discount Engine + Internal PDF) end-to-end validation against live preview URL. Backend: 9/9 pytest v28 tests pass (templates seeded, upsert + RBAC, has-stock-history, starter-kit, indent discount math, discount-summary shape, customer/internal PDF). Frontend: ALL 5 user flows pass — Preview items rename + modal CRUD + persistence on /pricing/tiers, violet starter-kit-offer banner on new franchise (FR-QA-UI-1782314152 / startup_model=MASTER), Yes-load fills cart with 5 line items + per-row Disc % + correct discounted total (₹71,469.13), live Disc % edit reduces total (12.5→50 dropped to ₹68,815.63), Raise Indent → toast 'Indent IND-0184 created', and OLD franchise (Delhi) correctly shows NO banner.

issues: Button label is 'PDF' (icon-only with single word) — the v2.8 spec calls it 'Download PDF'. Cosmetic only; data-testid='download-pdf-btn' is wired to GET /api/tax-invoices/{id}/pdf (no ?view param) which the backend treats as customer view, so the functional requirement (download URL contains '/pdf', customer view by default) IS met. Suggest changing button text to 'Download PDF' for clarity and to match the PRD wording.

action_items: (Optional, cosmetic) /app/frontend/src/pages/TaxInvoiceDetail.jsx line 274 — change the 'PDF' button label to 'Download PDF' to match v2.8 wording; behavior is already correct.

(Optional, doc) The review request mentions '/orders/new' for the New Order page, but the actual route is '/indents/new' (App.js line 63). Either add an /orders/new alias Route or update PRD wording to /indents/new — flagging for main agent's awareness only.

(Side effect of testing — informational only) MASTER template default_discount was modified from 10 → 12.5 during the persistence test as required by the test script. Re-seed or POST {model_name:'MASTER', default_discount:10, ...} if the seeded default needs to be restored.

(Tracking) discount-summary grand_total.discount_given is currently 0.00 because no DISPATCHED/DELIVERED/FULFILLED/PARTIAL indent yet carries a discount_percent line. The endpoint shape and aggregation logic are correct; once any v2.8-discounted indent transitions to dispatched/delivered, the number will become non-zero. No code change needed.
critical_code_review_comments: /app/frontend/src/pages/FranchiseTiers.jsx — Multiple tier cards are seeded twice in the demo DB so the page shows two BUDDY / two MASTER / etc. cards. Recommendation: either de-dup in the GET /api/franchise-model-templates response (keep latest per model_name) or have the FE de-dup by model_name before render. Currently the system works because Save is upsert keyed by model_name, but the duplicate cards are confusing for users.

/app/frontend/src/pages/NewOrder.jsx — Total label 'Total (after discount)' is good; consider also showing 'Total before discount' and 'You saved' lines so the user can see the saved amount, mirroring the discount-summary report contract.

/app/backend/routers_templates.py — POST /api/franchise-model-templates upserts by model_name without uniqueness enforcement at DB level; recommend a unique index on model_name to prevent the duplicate-cards issue noted above.

/app/backend/server.py create_indent — line_total math (unit_price * qty * (1 - disc/100)) is applied per-line which is correct, but the indent header total_value isn't returned in the response payload of the smoke test. Suggest unit assertion for total_value == sum(line_total).

success_rate.backend: 9/9 (100%) on test_v28_templates_discount.py + extra curl smoke (Content-Type=application/pdf for both view modes, internal PDF byte count 5159 vs customer 5012, discount-summary keys complete).
success_rate.frontend: 5/5 user-visible flows pass (Preview-items rename, template modal CRUD + persistence, starter-kit banner + cart auto-load with Disc %, Disc % edit recalculates Total, OLD-franchise no banner). Only cosmetic deviation: 'PDF' vs 'Download PDF' label.

test_credentials: admin@servall.com/Admin@123, accountant@servall.com/Accountant@123, warehouse@servall.com/Warehouse@123, franchise@servall.com/Franchise@123 — all verified working live.
seed_data_creation: Created via test scripts: franchise FR-QA-UI-1782314152 ('UI QA Master 1782314152', startup_model=MASTER, hub_id=hub-main) plus the pytest fixture franchises FR-QA-* with startup_model=MASTER. One new indent IND-0184 was raised against FR-QA-UI-1782314152 with one row discounted at 50% (the rest at 12.5%). MASTER template default_discount was changed from 10 → 12.5 by the persistence test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: v2.8 backend + frontend are functionally complete. If retesting: (1) franchise UI list filter UI shows FR-QA-UI-1782314152 — reuse it; (2) MASTER template default_discount is now 12.5 not the seeded 10; (3) Real route for New Order page is /indents/new, NOT /orders/new mentioned in the review request; (4) discount-summary.grand_total.discount_given is still 0 because no v2.8-discounted indent has been dispatched/delivered yet — to validate >0, dispatch IND-0184 via warehouse role flow then re-hit GET /api/reports/discount-summary; (5) Tax Invoice 'Download PDF' button label currently reads 'PDF' (data-testid=download-pdf-btn).
rca of the issue: No blocking bugs found in v2.8. Single cosmetic deviation: PDF button label says 'PDF' vs PRD's 'Download PDF' wording. The wired URL (`${BACKEND_URL}/api/tax-invoices/{id}/pdf`) omits the ?view query, which the backend pdf_endpoint treats as customer view by default — satisfying the functional requirement that the download URL contains '/pdf' in customer view by default.
